cookies.title: Privacy Policies
cookies.message: We only use basic cookies to keep your language preferences saved locally. We do not track or sell your personal data. By continuing to navigate, you agree to our terms.
cookies.modal_content:
Old School Pinball values your privacy in accordance with data protection laws.

We do not maintain server databases to store user profiles, passwords, or tracking behaviors.

We exclusively use browser 'Local Storage' to remember your language choice (such as English or Portuguese) in future visits and to hide this consent notice.

No personal information is transferred, sold, or mapped by our online service.

If you have questions regarding our digital or physical operations, feel free to contact us via WhatsApp.
